caption: A screen recording shows a web browser displaying a presentation titled "Rural Community Food System." The page features an "Introduction" section that asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and includes a list of "Session Videos" with various dates and links. Below this, a paragraph explains how viewers can contribute to the model by "adding communities" or "logging a member," directing them to "the former Wiki Collaborative" for a full set of guides. A "Legend" at the bottom identifies "Large Corporate Farm Systems" and "Community Based and Mixed-Ownership Production." In the top right corner of the browser, a small webcam feed shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. Across the sequence of frames, the browser window remains stationary and the man in the webcam feed remains mostly still, though his expression and head position shift slightly.
